features: 7 semantic sections (nav, hero, features, testimonials, pricing, CTA, footer)
Extended node types: div, component, symbol, text, image, link, button, form, input, section
New icons for section, link, button, form, input, symbol types
Expand All / Collapse All section controls
Per-node visibility toggle (eye icon) on hover
Section nodes with medium font weight

title: Layers Panel - Full page DOM tree with collapsible sections
